Module 2:
Introduction
!
Executive Summary
Welcome to Module 2. Just by getting here past module 1 you are in the
top 1% of entrepreneurs right now! A lot of people sign up for programs but
never even get started - you’re now much further along than most people. !
Your business will never be the same after going through this course and
implementing what you learn. We’re now going to go deeper on story and
sequencing and begin molding your launch story.!
Module 2 will cover
• Mental triggers!
• Your marketing story!
• Business launch formula!
• Each launch becomes a sequence within your bigger business launch
formula!
Remember this is not about overnight change, it’s about incremental
change that leads to exponential change.!
!
